segments.text: I love the Lord, for he heard my voice; he heard my cry for mercy.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Because he turned his ear to me, I will call on him as long as I live.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The cords of death entangled me, the anguish of the grave came over me; I was overcome by distress and sorrow.
Then I called on the name of the Lord:
Lord, save me!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The Lord is gracious and righteous; our God is full of compassion.
The Lord protects the unwary; when I was brought low, he saved me.
Return to your rest, my soul, for the Lord has been good to you.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For you, Lord, have delivered me from death, my eyes from tears, my feet from stumbling,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: that I may walk before the Lord in the land of the living.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I trusted in the Lord when I said, 'I am greatly afflicted'
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: in my alarm I said, 'Everyone is a liar.'
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: What shall I return to the Lord for all his goodness to me?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will lift up the cup of salvation and call on the name of the Lord.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will fulfill my vows to the Lord in the presence of all his people.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Precious in the sight of the Lord is the death of his faithful servants.
Truly I am your servant, Lord; I serve you just as my mother did; you have freed me from my chains.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will sacrifice a thank offering to you and call on the name of the Lord.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will fulfill my vows to the Lord in the presence of all his people,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: in the courts of the house of the Lord— in your midst, Jerusalem. Praise the Lord.
segments.speaker: David
